summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TeacherHubPro homepage redesign. All 18 features tested and working correctly: Hero section with CTAs, navigation links, Problem/Solution/Outcomes/How It Works/Built for Educators sections, auth forms with tab switching, Google Auth button, footer links, mobile responsiveness, and scroll reveal animations.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Scroll reveal animations using IntersectionObserver work correctly
Mobile responsive design properly implemented with stacked layouts
Auth form tab switching between Register and Login works smoothly
All 5 feature cards, 5 outcome checkmarks, 3 how-it-works steps, and 5 audience pills render correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage redesign fully verified. All sections display correctly: Hero (Save 5+ Hours headline, both CTAs scroll to correct sections), Problem (dark background), Solution (5 feature cards), Outcomes (5 checkmarks), How It Works (3 steps with icons), Built for Educators (5 audience pills), Final CTA with tabbed auth form. Login with test@school.edu/testpassword redirects to dashboard. Mobile responsive at 390x844 viewport.
